name: LendNation
description_short: LendNation at 6501 Troost Ave, Kansas City, MO 64131 in the Neighborhood United for Action neighborhood is Mon-Fri 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 5.0 stars across 633 reviews. Call +1 816-926-9977.
description_long:
LendNation is a national short-term lending chain with more than 200 brick-and-mortar locations across 11 states. The San Antonio branch on Bandera Road has been in continuous operation since 2005, giving it over two decades of presence in the local market. The company positions itself on customer service, describing its approach as treating customers the way it would want to be treated itself.

The company offers a broad menu of loan products. Payday loans (also called cash advances) range from roughly $100 to $1,000 and are designed to bridge the gap to a borrower's next paycheck. Multi-pay installment loans extend repayment over longer terms — up to 36 months — with bi-weekly, semi-monthly, or monthly payment schedules. Title installment loans allow borrowers to use a free-and-clear vehicle title (cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, ATVs, or RVs, depending on state) as collateral for potentially larger loan amounts. Beyond loans, LendNation provides check cashing, Insight Mobile Banking prepaid cards, direct deposit services, and instant debit card funding.

Several operational features stand out. Borrowers can apply online or in-store and receive an instant pre-approval decision. The instant debit card funding option allows approved borrowers to receive cash the same day without waiting for an ACH transfer. The San Antonio location holds a 4.8-star Google rating based on 161 reviews, suggesting consistently positive in-person experiences. Saturday hours (9 AM–1 AM) extend access beyond the standard Monday–Friday window, though Sunday service is not available.

Honestly assessed, LendNation fills a specific and narrow need: fast cash for borrowers who cannot access conventional credit on short notice. Payday and title loans carry high costs that are characteristic of the industry and are not disclosed on the location page reviewed. Title loans carry the added risk of vehicle repossession if payments are missed. Borrowers who can qualify for credit union payday alternative loans (PALs) or personal loans from online lenders will almost certainly find lower rates. LendNation is best viewed as a last-resort option rather than a routine borrowing tool.
pros: San Antonio location has been operating continuously since 2005 — over 20 years in market
4.8-star Google rating from 161 reviews at this branch
Instant debit card funding enables same-day cash disbursement without ACH delays
Multiple loan structures available: single-payment payday, installment, and title loans
Online application with instant pre-approval decision
Saturday hours (9 AM–1 PM) extend availability beyond a standard weekday schedule
More than 200 locations across 11 states for in-person support
cons: Payday and title loan APRs are not disclosed on the location page and are typically very high
Title loans carry vehicle repossession risk if payments are missed
Sunday hours are unavailable at this branch
Saturday access is limited to a 4-hour window (9 AM–1 PM)
Product availability and online access vary by state, limiting consistency for multi-state borrowers
best_for: Employed borrowers facing an unexpected expense who need cash before their next paycheck
Vehicle owners with a free-and-clear title who need a larger short-term loan
Borrowers who prefer in-person service and have been declined by traditional lenders
Consumers who need installment-style repayment spread over months rather than a lump-sum payoff
diagnosis: LendNation is best suited for borrowers with limited credit options who need small-dollar cash quickly and can repay within one pay cycle or over a structured installment plan. The main caveat is cost: payday and title loans from storefront lenders carry some of the highest APRs in consumer finance, and title loans add the risk of losing a vehicle — borrowers should exhaust credit union PALs, employer advances, and personal loan options before applying.
services: Title installment loans (cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, ATVs, RVs)
Online loan application with instant pre-approval
